songs.title: Sue me
feed: “Sue me” by Audrey Hobert reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Sue me” by Audrey Hobert reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 1 spot to #1.
“Sue me” by Audrey Hobert is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 60 sales units.
“Sue me” by Audrey Hobert is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 110 streams units.
“Sue me” by Audrey Hobert is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 280,098 total units.
